title: Require Mapgen Doc Mini Toc Shape
forbids: canonical MapGen Markdown docs whose first non-empty line does not start with <toc>
why: MapGen docs are navigational enforcement inputs; their mini table-of-contents block must remain a static Markdown shape invariant.
remediate: Add the mini XML <toc> block as the first non-empty content in the MapGen doc.
message: Canonical MapGen docs must start with a mini XML <toc> block.
